title: TinyCloud Capability Registry
description: Schema for capabilities.json — the single source of truth for TinyCloud capability action URNs (TC-112).

urn.description: Full capability action URN, e.g. tinycloud.kv/get.

service.description: Service prefix of the URN, e.g. tinycloud.kv.

status.description: active: dispatched by the node. deprecated-alias: accepted but resolves to aliasOf. reserved: accepted at the policy boundary but not dispatched yet.

aliasOf.description: Required when status is deprecated-alias: the canonical URN this alias resolves to.

implies.description: URNs implied by holding this one (e.g. sql/admin implies sql/schema). Used by containment subset checks.

notes.description: Provenance/grounding note — where the node-side handling lives, or why the status is what it is. Documentation only; not emitted into generated code.
